title: Ubiquiti UP-Siren-PoE
category: Ubiquiti / IoT, SMART / Smart security / Siren
description: Acoustic siren with 110 dB alarm and LED indication. It connects using 100 Mbps Ethernet port, which also serves power for input through PoE 802.3af . The maximum power consumption of the siren is 5 W. Ingress protection is IP56 . It is suitable for both indoor and outdoor installation on a wall or ceiling 110 db acoustic alarm with LED indication 100 Mbps Ethernet port with PoE 802.3af Ingress Protection IP56 Device Holder Waterproof cable gland Mounting accessories
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af Max. power consumption [W] 5
